generated_oml:
instance GantryCraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors embedded in lab-scale gantry crane for real-time state data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including position, velocity, and other operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization of lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for architectural visualization of lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for persistent storage of operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization using C4 model and crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical vs. digital behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of operational metrics for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccessInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive real-time monitoring of crane states"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Trajectory optimization for crane movement using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison of physical system behavior against digital model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataAccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to stored historical crane operational data"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operational states for monitoring"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of optimal crane trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of physical system against digital twin predictions"
]

instance PhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical laboratory environment for lab-scale gantry crane"

]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment for crane monitoring and control"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneInterface, TimescaleDBEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with mechanical structure and embedded controller"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interface for transmitting crane state data to digital twin"
]

    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) sends commands via the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane.
